baseline_state: no executable tests; baseline = current file content of plugins/base/commands/next.md captured before Story 01 edits

frontmatter_before.name: next
frontmatter_before.description: Pick the next actionable finding from BACKLOG.md and dispatch it to the right workflow (/base:bug or /base:feature).

input_section_before.text:
## Input: $ARGUMENTS

This command takes no arguments. Selection is internal.

notes: Line numbers are 1-indexed from the file as read before any S1 edit. The baseline records what headings, frontmatter fields, and Input section were present so the examiner can confirm no pre-existing steps were altered.
